Our Firm

A rare, exclusive boutique
healthcare M&A advisory

We are headquartered in Boston, Massachusetts — a renowned hub for management consulting and investment in accelerator-driven scale-ups. Boston Mantra® is a rare, exclusive boutique M&A advisory and management consulting firm specializing in healthcare deals.

"Modular service platform design — choose only what services are needed to complete the deal successfully and ethically."

We leverage our unique scientific capabilities to assist in management consulting to develop your healthcare or life sciences business, facilitate buy-sell transactions of interests, and ensure successful pre/post-transaction integration.

Our process follows strategic M&A advisory buy-side or sell-side steps to include certified professionals at each step — business exit consulting, tax compliance, estate planning, and valuation analysis.

Our management consulting platform helps sellers improve value-propositions before due diligence discussions. Our advisors are highly esteemed journal authors, peer-reviewers, public speakers, academic faculty, patent holders, and venture founders.

Unlike traditional investment banks and brokerages, our advisors are professionally certified in post-merger integration — actively supporting deal success post-transaction with aligned non-success fee incentives.

More than just helping healthcare enterprise flourish, we support public health through donations to research institutes like the Golden Hour Service Foundation to promote value-based care, evidence-based medicine, and improved patient experience.

Our clients in the public sector who require mergers of public corporations or support for public-private partnerships can benefit from our reliable expertise and certified commitment to inclusive, sustainable, cost-sensitive services.

Our Approach

Why clients choose
Boston Mantra

01
Modular Convenience
Unlike big exit brokers with large commissions or success fees, we focus on modular convenience — choose only what services are needed to complete the deal successfully and ethically.
02
Certified Professionals
Our experts maintain professional-level certifications in each discipline. Where modular services outside deal-scope are required, we offer valuation consulting, wealth management, tax audit, and information security support.
03
Scientific Differentiation
Our advisors are journal authors, peer-reviewers, public speakers, academic faculty, patent holders, and venture founders who drive specialized analytics to support pre-merger integration conceived at the early stages.
04
Non-Success Fee Alignment
Unlike traditional investment banks and brokerages, our advisors are certified in post-merger integration — actively supporting deal success post-transaction with aligned non-success fee incentives.
05
Public-Private Expertise
Clients in the public sector requiring mergers of public corporations or support for public-private partnerships benefit from our reliable expertise and certified commitment to inclusive, sustainable, cost-sensitive services.
06
Cross-Border Capability
We stay actively engaged with industry leaders and public officials to facilitate cross-border investment in value growth — combining international reach with deep US healthcare market knowledge.
Terms, Privacy & Disclaimers

Legal & compliance

General Disclaimer

Boston Mantra is an M&A advisory welcoming only inquiries for asset-structured merger-acquisitions. We do not guarantee outcomes for investment decisions made in connection to our business.

Investments may lose value because market conditions are subject to change. We are governed by the laws of Massachusetts.

Information on this site is intended to offer general information or education — not to provide investment or legal advice. We are not responsible for the accuracy or completeness of third-party content linked or referenced.

No relationship is established unless given in writing. All services are limited only to what is permissible by law and offered in connection to the scope of written agreement.

Privacy Policy

Boston Mantra LLC respects your privacy and is committed to protecting your personal information. Information you provide through our contact form is used solely to respond to your inquiry and provide requested services.

We do not sell, trade, or transfer your personally identifiable information to outside parties without your consent, except as required by law.

Data retention: We retain contact information only as long as necessary to fulfill the purpose for which it was collected or as required by applicable law.

By submitting our contact form, you consent to receiving communications from Boston Mantra LLC regarding your inquiry. You may withdraw consent at any time by contacting us directly.

Terms of Use

By accessing this website, you agree to these terms. The content is provided for informational purposes only and does not constitute professional advice.

All content, logos, and materials on this site are the property of Boston Mantra LLC and protected by applicable intellectual property laws. Unauthorized reproduction is prohibited.

Boston Mantra LLC reserves the right to modify these terms at any time. Continued use of this website constitutes acceptance of any changes.

Regulatory Compliance

Boston Mantra LLC operates in compliance with applicable federal and state laws governing M&A advisory services in Massachusetts.

Our services are limited to what is permissible by law and are offered only in connection to the scope of a written agreement between Boston Mantra LLC and the client.

We maintain professional certifications in each discipline we practice and adhere to the highest ethical standards in all advisory engagements.

For formal inquiries or legal correspondence: 14 Lamplighter Drive, Shrewsbury, MA 01545, USA
